name: Difficulty

sections.intro: TheDifficultyof a timeline is a property that affects the degree of challenge and the final score of a run inInto the Breach. Into the Breach has four difficulties:Easy, Normal, Hard and Unfair.
sections.Easy:
- Each region has a maximum of 500 civilians and the highest score for an island is 2,500. A perfect four-island run will have a score of 10,000.
  - No alphaVekwill spawn outside of three-objective missions on the first and second island.
  - TheBot Leaderdoes not appear.
  - Less Vek will spawn across all missions.
  - Islands cannot have more than one type of rare Vek.
sections.Normal:
- Each region has a maximum of 1,000 civilians and the highest score for an island is 5,000. A perfect four-island run will have a score of 20,000.
  - Alpha Vek will appear outside of three-objective missions starting from the second island.
  - TheBot Leaderwill appear.
  - The normal amount of Vek will spawn.
  - The fourth island has two types of rare Vek.
sections.Hard:
- Each region has a maximum of 1,500 civilians and the highest score for an island is 7,500. A perfect four-island run will have a score of 30,000.
  - Alpha Vek will appear more often and can be encountered on any mission starting from the first island.
  - The third and fourth islands have two types of rare Vek.
  - A Boss Vek will appear on the first phase of theVolcanic Hive.
sections.Unfair:
- Introduced inAdvanced Edition.
  - All grid health earned is doubled.
  - Grid defense starts at zero.
  - Each region has a maximum of 2,000 civilians and the highest score for an island is 10,000. A perfect four-island run will have a score of 40,000.
  - More Vek will spawn than on Hard.
  - Alpha Vek frequency further increases.
  - On the fourth island, aVek Leaderwill appear in every regular mission, replacing one of the possible enemies that has a Boss variant (except theSpider Leaderand the islandsPsion). The HQ mission on the 4th island will also have two bosses to fight.
  - During 3 or 4 Island playthroughs, theVolcanic Hivenow has two bosses in each phase. The rules are similar to the previous point.

The
Difficulty
of a timeline is a property that affects the degree of challenge and the final score of a run in
Into the Breach
. Into the Breach has four difficulties:
Easy, Normal, Hard and Unfair.
Contents
1
Difficulty Effects
1.1
Easy
1.2
Normal
1.3
Hard
1.4
Unfair
Difficulty Effects
[
]
Easy
[
]
Each region has a maximum of 500 civilians and the highest score for an island is 2,500. A perfect four-island run will have a score of 10,000.
No alpha
Vek
will spawn outside of three-objective missions on the first and second island.
The
Bot Leader
does not appear.
Less Vek will spawn across all missions.
Islands cannot have more than one type of rare Vek.
Normal
[
]
Each region has a maximum of 1,000 civilians and the highest score for an island is 5,000. A perfect four-island run will have a score of 20,000.
Alpha Vek will appear outside of three-objective missions starting from the second island.
The
Bot Leader
will appear.
The normal amount of Vek will spawn.
The fourth island has two types of rare Vek.
Hard
[
]
Each region has a maximum of 1,500 civilians and the highest score for an island is 7,500. A perfect four-island run will have a score of 30,000.
Alpha Vek will appear more often and can be encountered on any mission starting from the first island.
The third and fourth islands have two types of rare Vek.
A Boss Vek will appear on the first phase of the
Volcanic Hive
.
Unfair
[
]
Introduced in
Advanced Edition
.
All grid health earned is doubled.
Grid defense starts at zero.
Each region has a maximum of 2,000 civilians and the highest score for an island is 10,000. A perfect four-island run will have a score of 40,000.
More Vek will spawn than on Hard.
Alpha Vek frequency further increases.
On the fourth island, a
Vek Leader
will appear in every regular mission, replacing one of the possible enemies that has a Boss variant (except the
Spider Leader
and the islands
Psion
). The HQ mission on the 4th island will also have two bosses to fight.
During 3 or 4 Island playthroughs, the
Volcanic Hive
now has two bosses in each phase. The rules are similar to the previous point.
